title: Anti Cheat UB
description: UB Anti-Cheat is a powerful and highly aggressive Minecraft anti-cheat plugin with advanced detections like KillAura, Reach, AutoClicker, AimAssist, and more. Built for maximum security and instant punishment.
body:
🛡️ UB Anti-Cheat — Advanced & Aggressive Minecraft Anti-Cheat

UB Anti-Cheat (UBAC) is a modern, high-performance Minecraft anti-cheat plugin designed to detect and stop cheaters instantly. Built with aggressive detection logic, it ensures fair gameplay and maximum protection for your server.

⚡ Key Features:
• Ultra-aggressive detection system (low violation tolerance)
• Instant punishments (kick/ban system)
• Advanced combat checks:
  - KillAura detection
  - Reach detection
  - AimAssist detection
  - TriggerBot detection
  - AutoClicker detection
• Movement checks:
  - Speed
  - Fly
  - NoFall
  - Step
  - Jump
• World & interaction checks:
  - FastBreak
  - Hitbox
  - CrystalAura
  - AnchorAura
  - AutoTotem
  - ESP tracking detection
• Smart violation system with decay control
• Fully customizable config.yml
• Lightweight and optimized performance
• Real-time alerts system with player ping & VL info

🔥 Why choose UB Anti-Cheat?
Unlike most anti-cheats, UBAC is designed to be extremely strict and fast. With low violation thresholds (1–3), cheaters are detected and punished almost instantly.

⚠️ Note:
This plugin is highly aggressive. It may cause false positives on high ping or inexperienced players. Recommended for competitive or PvP-focused servers.

🎯 Perfect for:
• Practice PvP servers
• Hardcore survival servers
• Competitive Minecraft networks
• Anti-cheat focused setups

🧩 Compatibility:
• Spigot / Paper servers
• Optimized for latest Minecraft versions

📦 Installation:
1. Download the plugin
2. Place it in your /plugins folder
3. Restart your server
4. Configure settings in config.yml

🚀 Take your server security to the next level with UB Anti-Cheat!
